Container.Name: bramble
Container.Overview: Self-hosted garden management, care, research, and planning app. Tracks plants, zones, care tasks, and property data with interactive pixel art garden maps.
Container.Description: Bramble - Garden management app with pixel art property maps, plant mood tracking, care task scheduling, and weather integration. Self-hosted with SQLite database.

Config.Name: Perenual API Key
Config.Description: Optional: enables online plant database search (get free key at perenual.com)
